dividends.title: Dividends
dividends.sub: Dividend distribution + dividend tax (16% from 2026, 10% transitional) — posts the 117/457/446 entry and the D100 deadline
dividends.beneficiaryCnpHint: Required for declaration 205 (annual informative, per beneficiary). 13 digits with the check digit.
dividends.beneficiaryResident: Beneficiary is a Romanian tax resident
dividends.beneficiaryResidentHint: Residents are reported in D205; non-residents in D207. Ticked by default.
dividends.interim2025Hint: Tick only for dividends distributed on 2025 interim statements — the rate stays 10% even if paid in 2026 (Law 141/2025 art. VII).
dividends.confirmDelete: Delete this dividend? Its GL entry is removed too.
